# get_request_status { #socialinfrascorepy.get_request_status }

```python
get_request_status(client, request_id)
```

Get status of a submitted request.

Row-level security restricts results to the authenticated user's
own requests.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name       | Type     | Description                                                                                              | Default    |
|------------|----------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| client     | SIClient | A client from :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.client` authenticated with :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.sign_in`. | _required_ |
| request_id | str      | Request UUID string.                                                                                     | _required_ |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description                                    |
|--------|------------------|------------------------------------------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame | A single-row DataFrame, or empty if not found. |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> status = si.get_request_status(authed, result["request"]["id"])
```
